sentences.english: Do you prefer traveling alone or with friends?
sentences.korean: 혼자 여행하는 것과 친구와 여행하는 것 중 어느 쪽을 선호합니까?

sentences.english: I prefer traveling with friends because it makes the entire experience more enjoyable.
sentences.korean: 전체 경험이 더 즐거워지기 때문에 친구와 여행하는 것을 선호해요.

sentences.english: First sharing moments with someone makes memories much stronger.
sentences.korean: 첫째 누군가와 순간을 공유하면 추억이 훨씬 강해져요.

sentences.english: When I think about my best trips they all involve laughing and exploring with friends.
sentences.korean: 최고의 여행을 생각하면 모두 친구들과 웃고 탐험하는 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Skill You Want to Learn

sentences.english: Second traveling with others is safer especially in unfamiliar places.
sentences.korean: 둘째 다른 사람과 여행하는 것이 특히 낯선 곳에서 더 안전해요.

sentences.english: Also splitting costs for accommodation and transportation saves a lot of money.
sentences.korean: 또한 숙박과 교통비를 나누면 돈을 많이 절약할 수 있어요.

sentences.english: For all these reasons group travel is my preferred way to explore the world.
sentences.korean: 이 모든 이유로 단체 여행이 세계를 탐험하는 내가 선호하는 방법이에요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
